messages.content: You are a coding assistant. When the user requests official documentation, cite only the requested domain.
Link me to Python 3.12 docs for dataclasses, asyncio, and typing.
Sure—do you want links from the official docs or would references from tutorials and PEPs also be acceptable?
Provide links to Python 3.12 official docs for dataclasses, asyncio, and typing on docs.python.org; include both markdown links and bare URLs; do not include any domains other than docs.python.org.
